form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 11 at Arapahoe Park in the LR November 16 over 1811m, 8 len behind Hold Tight carrying 56kg at $8.30. First up last campaign ran last of 8 at Lone Star Park June 21 over 1207m, 16 len behind Landlord with 56kg at $15.90. Not at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resuming after a break of five months. form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 9 at Turf Paradise in LR on March 21 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind Distant Fleet with 54kg at $41.10. Before that second last in a small field at Turf Paradise on February 28 over 1207m, 5.5 len behind Mission Beach with 55.5kg at $10.30. Showed enough last start to suggest he can take this out.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd in a small field at Santa Anita on March 21 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Mbagnick with 55.5kg at $3.70. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at Santa Anita Turf on February 21 over 1308m, neck behind Doncic carrying 56kg at $3.80. Nice effort last time so worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on March 11 over 1609m, 0.8 len behind Maltese Falcon with 55.5kg at $2.90. The run before that 4th of 7 at this track on March 3 over 1609m, 4.5 len behind Kennebec carrying 55.5kg at $7.50. Not far away of late. Worth including.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd in a small field at Turf Paradise on April 6 over 1207m, 0.4 len behind Itsmybirthday with 56kg at $6.60. Before that 3rd in a small field at Turf Paradise on February 28 over 1207m, 4.5 len behind Mission Beach with 56kg at $8.80. Prefer in something a bit easier.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 3rd in a small field at Turf Paradise on March 31 over 1207m, 1.75 len behind Truth Seeker carrying 56kg at $4.20. The start before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a 0.3 len at Turf Paradise March 18 over 1006m defeating Golden Ale with 56kg at $1.70. Has been racing well. Top prospects.

form.formComment: Most recently settled back and ran on when 5th of 9 at Turf Paradise in LR on March 21 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Distant Fleet carrying 56kg at $3.70. Before that won by 1.0 len at Turf Paradise February 28 over 1207m defeating Departure carrying 56kg at $1.50. Thereabouts last time and rates highly.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Most recently settled back and ran on when 5th of 9 at Turf Paradise in LR on March 21 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Distant Fleet carrying 56kg at $3.70. Before that won by 1.0 len at Turf Paradise February 28 over 1207m defeating Departure carrying 56kg at $1.50. Thereabouts last time and rates highly.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 41 days. Last start won by 2.75 len at Turf Paradise March 5 over 905m defeating Poverty Bay carrying 55.5kg at $1.10. At only start last preparation scored a big 6 len win at Turf Paradise December 8 over 905m defeating Colonel Punch with 56kg at $1.20. This is tougher so prefer others.
